title: carex doisutepensis
intro: Carex doisutepensis, also known as the Doi Suthep sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to Thailand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Carex doisutepensis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions in traditional medicine.
